---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? (Describe the need, not just a solution.)

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Sketches, example flows, or links welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one.

## Additional context

Anything else — related pages/routes, prior discussion, screenshots.
